eligible_applicant_type: For-profit micro businesses in creative fields
geographic_restrictions: Allegheny, Beaver, Greene, and Washington counties in Pennsylvania
project_area: Creative industries including marketing, architecture, visual arts, crafts, design, film and media, digital games, music, entertainment, and publishing
demographic_requirements: Applicants must be at least 18 years of age, live in the specified counties, and operate a business with gross revenue under $200,000. Priority may be given to applicants in low-income, urban, suburban, or rural communities.
eligibility_summary: Open to creative entrepreneurs starting a business or operating a micro business in eligible creative fields. Non-profits are ineligible. Applicants must first complete a business plan consultation with a Referral Coordinator and demonstrate eligibility. Previous recipients must wait three years before reapplying.
